testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - hear what our distinguished clients have to say.

testimonial1.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial1.text: HR Office transformed our HR management process. What used to take hours now takes minutes. The analytics are incredible!

testimonial2.name: Michael Chen
testimonial2.text: The real-time tracking and automated approvals have saved us countless hours. Best HR tool we've ever used.

testimonial3.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonial3.text: Finally, an HR management system that employees actually love to use. The face recognition login is a game-changer!

testimonial4.name: David Kim
testimonial4.text: The automated workflows saved our HR team 15 hours per week. Setup was incredibly easy and the support team is outstanding.

testimonial5.name: Lisa Thompson
testimonial5.text: Managing leave across 12 offices used to be a nightmare. Now everything is centralized and our compliance rate is 100%.

testimonial6.name: James Wilson
testimonial6.text: We switched from a legacy HR system and saw immediate improvements in employee satisfaction and manager productivity.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Everything you need to know about HR Office and how it works.
faq.q1: How does the leave management system work?
faq.a1: Our platform streamlines the entire leave request process. Employees can submit requests through an intuitive interface, managers receive instant notifications for approval, and all leave balances are automatically tracked and updated in real-time.
faq.q2: Can I integrate this with my existing HR tools?
faq.a2: Yes! We offer seamless integrations with popular HR platforms, payroll systems, and calendar applications. Our API allows for custom integrations to fit your specific workflow needs.
faq.q3: What kind of reports can I generate?
faq.a3: You can generate comprehensive reports on leave trends, attendance patterns, team availability, and employee balances. All reports are exportable in PDF, Excel, and CSV formats with customizable date ranges and filters.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption (SSL/TLS), regular security audits, and comply with GDPR and other data protection regulations. Your data is stored in secure, redundant data centers with automatic backups.
faq.a5: Getting started is easy! Sign up for a free trial, add your team members, configure your leave policies, and you're ready to go. Our onboarding team will guide you through the setup process and answer any questions.
faq.a6: We offer multiple support channels including email support, live chat, comprehensive documentation, and video tutorials. Professional and Enterprise plans include priority support and dedicated account managers.

featuresPage.heroTitle: Everything you need to manage your team
featuresPage.heroSubtitle: From hiring to retirement — a complete suite of HR tools designed to streamline every aspect of people management.
featuresPage.platformSubtitle: Enterprise-grade features that scale with your organization
featuresPage.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of teams already using HR Office to manage their people effectively.

people.title: People Management
people.description: Centralized employee directory with profiles, org charts, departments, and document management.

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.description: Automated leave tracking with multiple types, policies, balance calculations, and approval workflows.
leave.feature1: Vacation, sick, family & custom leave types

attendance.title: Time & Attendance
attendance.description: Real-time check-in/out with geolocation, face recognition, and comprehensive time reports.

okr.title: OKR & Tasks
okr.description: Set objectives, track key results, and manage tasks with Kanban boards and progress tracking.

performance.title: Performance Reviews
performance.description: 360° performance evaluations with customizable review cycles, competency frameworks, and feedback.

recognition.title: Recognition & Rewards
recognition.description: Peer-to-peer recognition with a points system, badges, leaderboards, and reward marketplace.

surveys.title: Surveys & Pulse
surveys.description: Create custom surveys, pulse checks, and engagement polls with real-time analytics.

recruitment.title: Recruitment (ATS)
recruitment.description: Full applicant tracking system with career pages, pipeline management, and automated workflows.

esignatures.title: E-Signatures
esignatures.description: Send, sign, and manage documents electronically with legally binding digital signatures.

onboarding.title: Onboarding & Offboarding
onboarding.description: Structured workflows for new hires and departing employees with checklists and task automation.

multiOrg.title: Multi-Organization
multiOrg.description: Manage multiple organizations from a single account with role-based access control.

documents.title: Document Management
documents.description: Centralized document storage with version control, templates, and e-signature integration.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Real-time alerts with sound notifications, email digests, and push notifications.

multilingual.title: Multilingual (EN/RU/HY)
multilingual.description: Full localization support with automatic language detection and RTL support.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: 2FA, face recognition login, session management, and comprehensive audit logs.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect with Google Calendar, Slack, Microsoft Teams, and more.
